framework.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Integration Strategy
framework.description: Visa provides a remote MCP server as a standardized interface to their proprietary APIs. This positions Visa's protocols within the emerging MCP ecosystem (Anthropic-backed) while maintaining control over core primitives.
framework.raw_quote: Connect to Visa's Model Context Protocol (MCP) server to simplify the process of integrating Visa APIs into your agentic workflows.
